sentences.translationEn: The poet describes nature with wonderful words.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ إِنَّ الزُّهُورَ تَبْتَسِمُ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: On kaže da se cvijeće smiješi ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: He says that the flowers smile in the morning.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّشْبِيهُ يَجْعَلُ الْقَصِيدَةَ مَلِيئَةً بِالْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo poređenje čini pjesmu punom života.
sentences.translationEn: This metaphor makes the poem full of life.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَقْرَأُ الشِّعْرَ لِنَفْهَمَ مَشَاعِرَ الْإِنْسَانِ.
sentences.translation: Mi čitamo poeziju da bismo razumjeli ljudska osjećanja.
sentences.translationEn: We read poetry to understand human emotions.
